programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra is the only one who is disciplining the kids and Ray is too lenient. Debra asks Ray to take some responsibility and be a bit firm. (S7, E.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: For church charity, Debra signs Ray up to work at the hospital and she volunteers to work with the homeless. Initially Ray is apprehensive, but he starts to love the work. (S7, E.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy's mum and dad finally meet the Barone family, when they show up unexpectedly and try to talk Amy out of marrying Robert. Debra tries to help and fails. (S7, E.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Following Raymond and Frank's advice, Robert purposefully botches the wedding invitations in hopes of getting Amy to do all the preparations on her own. (S7, E.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra is sick so Ray has to drop Ally off at the home of his arch-enemy, Peggy. He helps her assemble a tent for the kids and he starts to believe that Peggy likes him. (S7, E.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Who's Next? When Marie's friend, Mrs. Caputo dies, Marie reveals that she had chosen Mrs. Caputo to be Frank's wife after her death. Frank says that he wants Harriet Lichmann instead. (S7, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe's big day becomes disastrous as deliveries go awry and a blizzard forces the plans to change. Meanwhile, Chandler and Ross compete to be a groomsman. (S10, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One Where Joey Speaks French: Phoebe tries to teach Joey French for an upcoming play, but becomes frustrated by Joey's lack of 'flair' for languages. (S10, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey feels abandoned when Monica and Chandler try to buy a house, but he finds solace with the sellers' precocious 8-year-old daughter (Dakota Fanning). (S10, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey is so upset by all of the change in his friends' lives that Phoebe goes to extreme lengths to prevent him from learning about the sudden death of his agent. (S10, E.

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Colombiana
programme.desc: In 1992 Bogotá, a little girl watches crime lord Don Luis and his henchman Marco murder her parents. Fifteen years later, the now-grown Cataleya, who is named for a Colombian orchid, works as a contract killer for her Chicago-based uncle. Leaving a lipstick drawing of her namesake on every victim, Cataleya carries out her assignments with efficiency and dreams of avenging her family.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham 123

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke Duke are a pair of good-ol'-boy brothers who tear through rural Hazzard County, Ga., transporting moonshine for their kindhearted Uncle Jesse in their tricked-out car, the General Lee. programme.title: This Time Each Year
programme.desc: Despite a trial separation, Lauren pretends to still be with her husband, Kevin, to placate her overbearing mother. The ruse may be just what the couple needs to finally work on their marriage.

programme.title: The Wish Swap
programme.desc: When Casey and Henry find themselves celebrating their birthdays at the same restaurant, they make birthday wishes at the same time which are granted. However, they end up getting each other's wishes.

programme.title: Freud's Last Session
programme.desc: On the eve of World War II, Sigmund Freud and C.S. Lewis gather to discuss the existence of God and the future of mankind.

programme.title: Ready Jet Go: Space Camp: The Movie
programme.desc: Jet and his friends take their skills to Space Camp and experience an intergalactic adventure.

programme.title: Night of the Zoopocalypse
programme.desc: When a meteor unleashes a virus that turns zoo animals into zombies, a mountain lion and a wolf lead a team of survivors to save the day.

programme.title: Paws in the City
programme.desc: A woman lands a job caring for a dachshund diva whose bark is worse than her bite, much like the dog's reclusive and handsome owner. What starts as a way to keep a roof over her head soon turns into an opportunity for lifelong success and love.

programme.title: Soul on Fire
programme.desc: A tragic accident leaves 9-year-old John O'Leary with burns covering 100% of his body. He soon embarks on a miraculous road to recovery with support from family, the community, and baseball announcer Jack Buck. Grateful for the gift of life, John becomes a motivational speaker who inspires millions of people to make the world a better place.

programme.title: Secret Headquarters
programme.desc: Friendship and courage take center stage when Charlie and his friends stumble upon the headquarters of the Guard and realize the world's most powerful superhero is Charlie's dad. When an evil businessman sends in a team to infiltrate the lair and retrieve the Guard's energy source, the youngsters spring into action and turn the tables on the intruders.

programme.title: Shayda
programme.desc: Shayda, a brave Iranian mother, finds refuge in an Australian women's shelter with her six-year-old daughter, where they take solace in new beginnings. When the estranged husband and father re-enters their lives, Shayda's path to freedom is jeopardized.

programme.title: RuPaul's All Stars Drag Race
programme.desc: For the first time in Drag Race herstory, the queens lip sync to classic '90s interviews from The RuPaul Show.

programme.title: Canada's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens team up to write and film cruise ship commercials.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Singles come together in a tropical location to look for romance, with one couple winning a cash prize.

programme.title: Ferrari
programme.desc: During the summer of 1957, bankruptcy looms over the company that Enzo Ferrari and his wife built 10 years earlier. He decides to roll the dice and wager it all on the iconic Mille Miglia, a treacherous 1,000-mile race across Italy.

programme.title: Pillion
programme.desc: A timid man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic, impossibly handsome biker takes him on as his submissive.

programme.title: Good Boy
programme.desc: A man moves into a new home that has supernatural forces lurking in the shadows. As dark entities start to threaten him, his brave dog comes to the rescue.

programme.title: Amish Affair
programme.desc: Hannah knows her secret relationship with Aaron, a charismatic Amish leader, has them both living in sin, so she decides to end it. However, when Aaron's wife suspiciously dies, she finds herself framed for murder and fighting to prove her innocence.

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: Maurice is a streetwise ginger cat who comes up with a money-making scam by befriending a group of talking rats. However, when Maurice and the rodents reach the town of Bad Blintz, their little con soon goes down the drain.

programme.title: Robot Dreams
programme.desc: In the 1980s New York City, Dog assembles Robot as a companion, and they become best buddies. On a Labor Day outing to Coney Island, Robot's metal parts rust, and he can't move.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: When Paddington discovers his beloved aunt has gone missing from the Home for Retired Bears, he and the Brown family head to the jungles of Peru to find her. Determined to solve the mystery, they soon stumble across a legendary treasure as they make their way through the rainforests of the Amazon.

programme.title: Air Bud: Seventh Inning Fetch
programme.desc: The golden retriever joins a middle-school baseball team and searches for his missing offspring.

programme.title: Air Bud: Spikes Back
programme.desc: A dog that plays volleyball helps investigators solve a rash of mysterious crimes.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutant Mayhem
programme.desc: After years of being sheltered from the human world, the Turtle brothers set out to win the hearts of New Yorkers and be accepted as normal teenagers. Their new friend, April O'Neil, helps them take on a mysterious crime syndicate, but they soon get in over their heads when an army of mutants is unleashed upon them.

programme.title: Hair of the Bear
programme.desc: Suffering from debilitating anxiety and refusing to go to school, 16-year-old Tori is driven to stay with her grandfather in a remote frozen wilderness but unexpectedly finds herself caught up in a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Challengers
programme.desc: Tashi, a tennis player turned coach, has transformed her husband from a mediocre player into a world-famous grand slam champion. programme.title: White Noise
programme.desc: Ava's debilitating hyper-sensitivity to sound is becoming unliveable. When an attempt at suicide fails, she pleads with her doctor to enrol her in an experimental trial involving an anechoic chamber: the world's quietest room.
